title: Department of Nursing Doctorate Program Application and Fees
content:
Department of Nursing Doctorate Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Tuesday, January 20, 2026

Exam Venue: Üsküdar University Health Campus, Classroom 612

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

NUMERIC (NUM)

Dear candidate students;

There will be a face-to-face science exam in Doctorate Programs;

The candidates will receive 50% of the ALES score in the relevant score type, 30% of the science exam, and 20% of the undergraduate (and/or) graduate grade point average.

– Original or certified copy of the Master's diploma

- Original or certified copy of Master's transcript (transcript)

- Copy of identity card

- Photo (2 Pieces)

Click to Download Foreign Language Exams Equivalency Documentary

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

Only candidates with undergraduate and graduate degrees in Nursing can apply to the Ph.D. Program.

- The applications of the candidates who registered to the Master's Program before 06 February 2013 will be accepted without making any distinction between thesis and non-thesis.

- Of our candidates who enroll in the Master's Program after February 06, 2013, only those who have graduated from the Master's program with thesis will be admitted to the PhD program.

- To have a score of 55 or more in YDS and an equivalent exam.

- To have a Master's Degree in Nursing with a minimum 2.50 GPA.

55 points from the numerical score type.

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

INFORMATION

In Nursing Department Nursing programs, a training is provided for our students to specialize in sub-branches of Nursing according to the courses they have taken and the scope of the thesis.

TUITION FEE:
